summary: Completed testing of HevaPOS Kitchen Display System (KDS) - Iteration 22. All 14 KDS backend tests PASSED. Frontend KDS page verified with all features working: color-coded tickets (red=NEW, amber=SEEN, yellow=COOKING, green=READY), live wait timers with flame icon for overdue orders (>15 min), QR/POS source badges, bump-through workflow (Acknowledge→Start Cooking→Ready for Pickup→Recall), sound toggle, avg prep time stats (1:51), refresh button. Sidebar KDS link with ChefHat icon works. Regression tests passed for POS screen (80 pending orders, 12 products) and Admin Dashboard (QR toggle, hourly chart). QR Guest Menu loads correctly at /menu/rest_demo_1/KrGTedTy.
critical_code_review_comments: KitchenDisplay.js: Well-structured KDS page with proper data-testid attributes (kds-page, kds-title, kds-avg-prep, kds-sound-toggle, kds-refresh, kds-ticket-{id}, kds-bump-{id}, kds-recall-{id})
kds.py: Clean API design with proper status flow (new→acknowledged→preparing→ready), WebSocket integration for real-time updates, business day filtering (2AM-2AM)
Sidebar.js: KDS link properly added to both restaurantAdminMenu and posStaffMenu with ChefHat icon
App.js: /kds route properly protected with ProtectedRoute component

success_rate.backend: 100% (14/14 KDS tests passed, 3 regression tests had rate limiting issues but verified via curl)

seed_data_creation: 15 active KDS orders from previous QR testing iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 KDS feature fully verified. KDS page at /kds shows digital tickets with: order number (#002), table info (Table 1), guest name, items with quantities, notes, wait timer (mm:ss format), QR/POS badge, color-coded status headers. Bump workflow: NEW (red, Acknowledge btn) → SEEN (amber, Start Cooking btn) → COOKING (yellow, Ready for Pickup btn) → READY (green, Recall btn). Top bar shows: Kitchen Display title, active/ready counters, avg prep time, sound toggle, refresh button. Timer turns red with flame icon when order waits >15 min. Stats endpoint returns queue_depth, status_counts, avg_prep_time_display. All previous features (QR ordering, dashboard analytics, POS) still working.

frontend_tests.kds_qr_pos_badges: PASSED - QR and POS badges visible
frontend_tests.kds_ready_btn: PASSED - Ready for Pickup button works
frontend_tests.pos_regression: PASSED - POS loads with 80 pending orders
frontend_tests.dashboard_regression: PASSED - Dashboard with QR toggle and chart

kds_page.description: Kitchen Display System at /kds with digital ticket board
kds_page.verification: Page loads with all data-testid attributes, 15 active tickets displayed

kds_color_coded_tickets.description: Tickets color-coded by status (red=new, amber=acknowledged, yellow=preparing, green=ready)
kds_color_coded_tickets.verification: Visual confirmation - NEW tickets have red header, COOKING yellow, READY green

kds_live_timers.description: Live wait timers showing mm:ss since order creation
kds_live_timers.verification: Timers visible on all tickets (e.g., 76:35, 47:08), flame icon on overdue orders

kds_qr_pos_badges.description: QR badge for QR orders, POS badge for POS orders
kds_qr_pos_badges.verification: 19 QR badges and 1 POS badge found on tickets

kds_bump_workflow.verification: All bump buttons work: Acknowledge, Start Cooking, Ready for Pickup, Recall

kds_sound_toggle.description: Sound toggle button to enable/disable new order beeps

kds_avg_prep_stats.description: Average prep time displayed in top bar

kds_sidebar_link.description: KDS link in sidebar with ChefHat icon
kds_sidebar_link.verification: Link found with text 'Kitchen (KDS)', navigates to /kds

kds_backend_apis.verification: GET /kds/orders, PUT /kds/orders/{id}/acknowledge|preparing|ready|recall, GET /kds/stats all return correct responses

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. No mocked endpoints.
